options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <{llx lly urx ury}> # Specifies the lower left x and y , upper right x and y coordinates of the pin guide.

options.name: <pinGuideName>
options.description: Specifies name of the pin, wildcard can be specified

options.name: <metalLayer>
options.description: Specifies the layer on which the pin guide resides.

options.name: <minSpace>
options.description: Specifies the minimum pin spacing for the pin guide.

options.name: <pinGroupCell>
options.description: Specifies the cell name if the pin guide is associated with a cell pin group.
